title: Make quick tip icon clickable with section navigation

requirements.summary: Make the quick tip icon (lightbulb icon) clickable in educational content sections
acceptanceCriteria: Quick tip icons are interactive elements that respond to clicks
Visual feedback is provided on hover to indicate clickability
Icon maintains its current styling and position

file_operations.description: Make the quick tip icon interactive by wrapping it in a button element with hover effects (cursor-pointer, opacity change). Add onClick handler that calls a scroll function to navigate to the corresponding section. Maintain current icon styling and position while adding visual feedback for clickability.

requirements.summary: When a quick tip icon is clicked, navigate directly to the corresponding section within the current educational content
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the icon smoothly scrolls to the associated section
The target section becomes visible in the viewport
Navigation works for all quick tip icons across different pest content pages

file_operations.description: Implement smooth scroll navigation by adding unique id attributes to the target sections that quick tips reference. Create a scrollToSection handler that uses element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }) to navigate to the section when the quick tip icon is clicked. Ensure the target section becomes visible in the viewport after scrolling.

Add smooth scroll navigation functionality to any quick tip icons present in the mice content. Add unique id attributes to target sections and implement scrollToSection handlers using element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }) to ensure clicking quick tip icons navigates to the corresponding section.
